# ContentFailure

**Object**

An object that describes why the client can’t play a specific piece of content.

## Declaration

```swift
object ContentFailure
```

## Discussion

The value of `errorCode` is one of the following:



If you receive a [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/ContentFailure] with an `errorCode` of `1002`, check the following:

- The configuration for your service’s certificate URL is correct. For more information, see [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/ExtensionConfig/Media-data.dictionary/Queues-data.dictionary/ContentProtectionKey-data.dictionary/Cks-data.dictionary].
- The protected item has a valid `assetIdentifier`.
- Your service’s key server module (KSM) provides a valid content key context (CKC) for the protected item’s `assetIdentifier`. For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/streaming/fps/FairPlayStreamingOverview.pdf].



## Playback Failure

- **Recover from Content Playback Failure**: Provide a recovery queue that allows the client to resume playback after an error.
- **ContentPlaybackFailureRequest**: A request the client sends to recover from failed content playback.
- **ContentPlaybackFailureResponse**: A response that allows the client to recover from failed content playback.
